'''鈭歜-j-th-l''' ('''kabajtheloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jackknife|jackknife]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-j-th-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jackknife|jackknife]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-j-th-l
|-
! Lemma
| kabajtheloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibajtheloko|thibajtheloko]] || [[word:jibajtheloko|jibajtheloko]] || [[word:shibajtheloko|shibajtheloko]] || [[word:kibajtheloko|kibajtheloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubajtheloko|thuthubajtheloko]] || [[word:jujubajtheloko|jujubajtheloko]] || [[word:shushubajtheloko|shushubajtheloko]] || [[word:kukubajtheloko|kukubajtheloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubajtheloko|thubajtheloko]] || [[word:jubajtheloko|jubajtheloko]] || [[word:shubajtheloko|shubajtheloko]] || [[word:kubajtheloko|kubajtheloko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubajtheloko|thubajtheloko]] || [[word:jubajtheloko|jubajtheloko]] || [[word:shubajtheloko|shubajtheloko]] || [[word:kubajtheloko|kubajtheloko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobajtheloko|thothobajtheloko]] || [[word:jojobajtheloko|jojobajtheloko]] || [[word:shoshobajtheloko|shoshobajtheloko]] || [[word:kokobajtheloko|kokobajtheloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobajtheloko|thobajtheloko]] || [[word:jobajtheloko|jobajtheloko]] || [[word:shobajtheloko|shobajtheloko]] || [[word:kobajtheloko|kobajtheloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobajtheloko|thobajtheloko]] || [[word:jobajtheloko|jobajtheloko]] || [[word:shobajtheloko|shobajtheloko]] || [[word:kobajtheloko|kobajtheloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bajtheloko|th忙bajtheloko]] || [[word:j忙bajtheloko|j忙bajtheloko]] || [[word:sh忙bajtheloko|sh忙bajtheloko]] || [[word:k忙bajtheloko|k忙bajtheloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabajtheloko|thathabajtheloko]] || [[word:jajabajtheloko|jajabajtheloko]] || [[word:shashabajtheloko|shashabajtheloko]] || [[word:kakabajtheloko|kakabajtheloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabajtheloko|thabajtheloko]] || [[word:jabajtheloko|jabajtheloko]] || [[word:shabajtheloko|shabajtheloko]] || [[word:kabajtheloko|kabajtheloko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabajtheloko|thabajtheloko]] || [[word:jabajtheloko|jabajtheloko]] || [[word:shabajtheloko|shabajtheloko]] || [[word:kabajtheloko|kabajtheloko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
